item.title: Crocodile Lays Eggs at Chandler's Wild Life
item.description: Chandler's Wild Life shares a crocodile laying eggs, offering a close look at reptile behavior and wildlife care.

media:content.media:title: Crocodile Lays Eggs at Chandler's Wild Life
media:content.media:description: Chandler's Wild Life shares a crocodile laying eggs, offering a close look at reptile behavior and wildlife care.

item.title: Observing the World’s Largest Viper Species
item.description: A close look at the world’s largest viper species, highlighting its size and unique characteristics in a respectful wildlife setting.

media:content.media:title: Observing the World’s Largest Viper Species
media:content.media:description: A close look at the world’s largest viper species, highlighting its size and unique characteristics in a respectful wildlife setting.

item.title: Swimming with Kaido the Otter
item.description: A calm look at Kaido the otter swimming, highlighting animal behavior and a respectful wildlife encounter

media:content.media:title: Swimming with Kaido the Otter
media:content.media:description: A calm look at Kaido the otter swimming, highlighting animal behavior and a respectful wildlife encounter

item.title: Bruce, the Broad-Snouted Caiman
item.description: Meet Bruce, a broad-snouted caiman featured by Chandler’s Wild Life, with a focus on reptiles and wildlife observation in Florida

media:content.media:title: Bruce, the Broad-Snouted Caiman
media:content.media:description: Meet Bruce, a broad-snouted caiman featured by Chandler’s Wild Life, with a focus on reptiles and wildlife observation in Florida

item.title: Cuban Croc Encounter Highlights
item.description: A look at this week’s wildlife episodes featuring a Cuban crocodile, with Chandler’s Wild Life sharing an educational encounter

item.title: King Cobra Feeding Observation
item.description: A close look at a king cobra’s feeding behavior in a wildlife setting, highlighting natural animal behavior and observation.

item.title: A Close Look at a Demanding Wildlife Job
item.description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a look at a challenging wildlife role and the care involved in working with animals.

item.title: Milking Venomous Snakes for Research
item.description: A close look at snake milking, a careful process used to collect venom for research and antivenom development.

media:content.media:title: Milking Venomous Snakes for Research
media:content.media:description: A close look at snake milking, a careful process used to collect venom for research and antivenom development.

item.title: King Cobra Behavior Observation
item.description: A close look at a king cobra’s behavior in a wildlife setting, highlighting reptile observation and respect for nature
